query: sodium vapor street light orange yellow night photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / sickly_cast — sodium vapor street light cast, orange/yellow night tint

response.objective_caption: A nighttime winter landscape with snow covering trees, bushes, and the ground in the foreground. A bright street lamp on the right illuminates the snow-laden branches, while a building with a light on its roof is visible in the background through fog or falling snow. Horizontal utility wires stretch across the dark sky above the scene.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime winter landscape with snow-covered trees, bushes, and ground. A street lamp on the right casts a sickly sodium vapor glow that shifts the snow and fog toward an unhealthy orange-yellow hue, permeating the scene with a contaminated warmth. In the background, a building with a bright rooftop light is visible through the haze, with horizontal utility wires stretching across the dark sky.
